title: %Error: ... : Expecting expression to be constant, but can't convert a CONSPACKUORSTRUCT to constant.

features.name: non_packed_struct_with_array_and_packed_struct_member
features.description: Code should include a non-packed struct type that contains both a static array member and a packed struct array member, used as a parameter type
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { int unsigned depth; } leaf_info_t;
typedef struct { int unsigned levels; int unsigned k [10]; int unsigned leaves; leaf_info_t leaf [72]; } tree_topo_t;

features.name: struct_literal_with_default_keyword_array_initializer
features.description: Code should include a struct literal assignment to a parameter where an array field is initialized using the default keyword syntax
features.snippet: parameter tree_topo_t TOPO = tree_topo_t'{ levels: 3, k: '{0:3, 1:3, 2:4, default:0}, leaves: 36, leaf: '{default:'{depth:3}} };

features.name: nested_default_struct_literal_in_array_field
features.description: Code should include a nested struct literal using default keyword inside an array field initializer of an outer struct literal
